items.title: MSP → LIS (overnight)
items.description: Overnight flight from Minneapolis/St. Paul to Lisbon
items.notes: Bring snacks for Lucy. Pack neck pillows. Lounge access in MSP G concourse.

items.title: The Lumiares Hotel & Spa
items.address: R. do Diário de Notícias 142, 1200-145 Lisboa
items.notes: Breakfast included. Rooftop bar with sunset views. Connecting rooms requested for Lucy.

items.title: Alfama Walking Tour
items.description: Guided stroll through Lisbon's oldest neighborhood
items.address: Largo do Chafariz de Dentro, Alfama, Lisbon
items.notes: Wear comfortable walking shoes — lots of cobblestones and hills. Guide meets at the fountain.

items.title: Cervejaria Ramiro
items.notes: Must-order: tiger prawns and the prego steak sandwich for dessert. Casual dress.

items.title: Belém Tower
items.notes: Skip-the-line tickets in the trip wallet. Bring water — limited shade.

items.title: Pastéis de Belém
items.notes: No reservation — go to takeaway window, eat in the square. Lucy: warm tart with cinnamon.

items.title: Jerónimos Monastery
items.notes: Quiet voices inside the cloisters. Kids' audio guide available at the desk.

items.title: National Tile Museum (Azulejo)
items.description: Hands-on tile painting workshop for Lucy
items.notes: Workshop is for ages 6+. Aprons provided. Pickup tile keepsake at the end.

items.title: Tapisco
items.notes: Smart casual. Ask for the chef's tasting plate. Kids' portions available.

items.title: Tram 28 Ride
items.description: Iconic yellow tram through Alfama, Graça, and Estrela
items.notes: Get on at the start of the line for seats. Watch bags — pickpockets common at peak hours.

items.title: Castelo de São Jorge
items.description: Hilltop castle with panoramic views and peacocks
items.notes: Lucy will love the peacocks. Uneven steps — careful at the ramparts.

items.title: Time Out Market
items.description: Lunch at the famous food hall
items.notes: No reservation needed. Each person picks a stall — meet at the central tables.

items.title: LX Factory Stroll
items.description: Creative district with bookshops, murals, and shops
items.notes: Don't miss Ler Devagar bookstore. Ice cream at Nannarella nearby.

items.title: Clube de Fado Dinner
items.description: Traditional Fado dinner show — early family seating
items.address: R. de São João da Praça 94, 1100-585 Lisboa
items.notes: Smart casual. Quiet during performances — Lucy briefed. Set menu pre-paid.

items.title: Train: Lisbon → Porto
items.description: Alfa Pendular high-speed train, Santa Apolónia → Campanhã
items.notes: Coach 12, seats 21A–24D. Arrive 20 min early. Snacks on board.

items.title: PortoBay Flores
items.notes: Breakfast in the cloister. Spa downstairs. Family room booked.

items.title: Ribeira Riverfront Walk
items.notes: Stop on the lower deck of Dom Luís I bridge for photos.

items.title: Cantinho do Avillez Porto
items.address: R. de Mouzinho da Silveira 166, 4050-417 Porto
items.notes: Try the exploding olives appetizer. Kids' menu on request.

items.title: Livraria Lello
items.notes: Timed entry — be at the door 10 min early. Voucher applies to a book purchase.

items.title: Six Bridges Douro Cruise
items.notes: Bring sunscreen and hats — open top deck. Life vests provided for kids.

items.title: Cervejaria Brasão Aliados
items.notes: Order one francesinha to share — it's huge. No reservations after 1pm — walk in.

items.title: Graham's Port Lodge Tour
items.description: Cellar tour and tasting in Vila Nova de Gaia
items.address: Rua do Agro 141, 4400-281 Vila Nova de Gaia
items.notes: Lucy gets a juice tasting. Cellars are cool — bring a light layer.

items.title: Cantina 32
items.notes: Must-order: cheesecake in a flowerpot. Casual.

items.title: Douro Valley Tour Pickup
items.description: Private driver pickup at hotel for vineyard day
items.notes: Driver name: António. Cooler with water in the van. Bring sunglasses.

items.title: Quinta do Seixo Tour & Tasting
items.notes: Grape juice tasting for Lucy. Photo spot at the upper terrace.

items.title: Lunch at Quinta DOC
items.notes: Tasting menu pre-arranged. Ask for the terrace table.

items.title: Pinhão River Cruise
items.notes: Bring the pretzel snacks from the van for Lucy.

items.title: Cantinho dos Avós
items.notes: Casual. Owner brings out homemade port at the end. Cash preferred.

items.title: Breakfast at Majestic Café
items.description: Belle Époque café — last morning treat
items.notes: Order the French toast. Photo of Lucy at the front.

items.title: OPO → LIS
items.notes: Short hop — about 55 min in air. Same booking as MSP leg.

items.title: LIS → MSP
items.notes: Arrives same calendar day MSP. Customs and bags at MSP — allow 60 min.
